summary: Tested Collections Hub with 4 tabs (Collection Manager, Collection Mapping, Page Settings, Detail Page). All features working correctly: 4 tabs with proper content, tab switching works, Detail Page shows trust badges/delivery settings with Reset/Save toolbar, WebsiteHub has exactly ONE Collections card in Navigation & Structure section, no duplicate collection cards in Content section, all standalone routes work, sidebar Website section links to WebsiteHub where Collections card is accessible.

/admin/collections shows 4 tabs.details: CollectionsHub loads with data-testid='collections-hub', shows 4 tabs: Collection Manager, Collection Mapping, Page Settings, Detail Page

Tab switching between all 4 tabs.details: All tabs switch correctly and render appropriate content

Detail Page tab content.details: Shows Trust Badges Strip, Delivery Estimate & Countdown sections, Reset to Defaults button, Save Changes button

WebsiteHub Navigation & Structure sectio.details: Has exactly ONE 'Collections' card with description 'Manage images, mappings, page content & detail settings', links to /admin/collections

WebsiteHub Content section.details: No collection-related cards in Content section (Homepage Manager, Trade Account, Customer Account, Checkout Settings, etc.)

Standalone /admin/collection-manager.details: Route works independently, shows Collection Manager header

Standalone /admin/collection-mapping.details: Route works independently, shows Collection Mapping header

Standalone /admin/collections-page-setti.details: Route works independently, shows Collections Page Settings content

Standalone /admin/collection-detail-sett.details: Route works independently, shows 'Collection Detail Page Settings' header with Reset to Defaults and Save Changes buttons

Sidebar Website section.details: Sidebar shows 'Website' as hub link pointing to /admin/website-hub. Collections is accessible via WebsiteHub page (not directly in sidebar due to hubLink design)

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - existing collections data used
context_for_next_testing_agent: CollectionsHub at /admin/collections now has 4 tabs (added Detail Page tab). The embedded prop controls whether child components show their own headers. Standalone routes (/admin/collection-manager, /admin/collection-mapping, /admin/collections-page-settings, /admin/collection-detail-settings) still work independently. WebsiteHub has ONE consolidated Collections card in Navigation & Structure section. Sidebar Website section uses hubLink design so Collections is accessed via WebsiteHub page.
